title: Job creation modal — notes, submit, and API integration
tech: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, CSS Modules, Axios
keyConstraints: No inline styles — CSS Modules only. Use axiosInstance from api/axios.ts.
description: Add the notes section to JobCreateModal and wire the full form to POST /api/jobs. Handle validation, loading state, errors, and list refresh on success.
acceptanceCriteria: NotesSection has 'Job content' textarea (what is being delivered/installed) and 'Dispatcher notes' textarea — both optional
Client-side validation on submit: name OR customerId required, jobType required, at least one address block must have street + city filled. Show inline error if not met.
Submit button reads 'Create job'; disabled and shows loading state while request is in flight
POST /api/jobs called with all form data mapped to backend field names; services sent as string array; scheduledStart/End sent as ISO strings or null
On success: modal closes and job list in JobsPage refreshes (refetch)
On API error: display error.response.data.error inside modal; modal stays open
implementationNotes: Map form state to API body before POST — do not send raw form state object
services array: string values matching backend enum keys e.g. ['DELIVERY', 'INSTALLATION']
Job list refresh: call existing fetch function after modal close
New jobs always created as DRAFT — do not send status in body
